'''yaduhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focusedness|focusedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focusedness|focusedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yaduhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædihith|yædihith]] || [[word:yædihij|yædihij]] || [[word:yædihish|yædihish]] || [[word:yædihi|yædihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yaduduhuth|yaduduhuth]] || [[word:yaduduhuj|yaduduhuj]] || [[word:yaduduhush|yaduduhush]] || [[word:yaduduhu|yaduduhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaduhuth|yaduhuth]] || [[word:yaduhuj|yaduhuj]] || [[word:yaduhush|yaduhush]] || [[word:yaduhu|yaduhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadufhuth|yadufhuth]] || [[word:yadufhuj|yadufhuj]] || [[word:yadufhush|yadufhush]] || [[word:yadufhuf|yadufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaduhuthu|yaduhuthu]] || [[word:yaduhuju|yaduhuju]] || [[word:yaduhushu|yaduhushu]] || [[word:yaduhuku|yaduhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaduhuth|yaduhuth]] || [[word:yaduhuj|yaduhuj]] || [[word:yaduhush|yaduhush]] || [[word:yaduhu|yaduhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaduhuthul|yaduhuthul]] || [[word:yaduhujul|yaduhujul]] || [[word:yaduhushul|yaduhushul]] || [[word:yaduhukul|yaduhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaduhuthuthu|yaduhuthuthu]] || [[word:yaduhujuju|yaduhujuju]] || [[word:yaduhushushu|yaduhushushu]] || [[word:yaduhuku|yaduhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaduhuthun|yaduhuthun]] || [[word:yaduhujun|yaduhujun]] || [[word:yaduhushun|yaduhushun]] || [[word:yaduhukun|yaduhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaduhuthuoro|yaduhuthuoro]] || [[word:yaduhujuoro|yaduhujuoro]] || [[word:yaduhushuoro|yaduhushuoro]] || [[word:yaduhukuoro|yaduhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
